project: Ink CLI Session UI V2 Web Parity
description: Extend renderer-neutral session-ui models for rich cards, status, command catalog, command results, and pickers consumed by Web and Ink.

userStories.title: Add shared terminal card descriptors
userStories.description: As a renderer implementer, I need shared card descriptors so Web and Ink use the same meaning for status, thinking, model, login, tool, yielded-run, and error cards.
acceptanceCriteria: Add renderer-neutral terminal card descriptor types under src/session-ui
Map representative trace/action outputs to card descriptors
Shared modules avoid DOM, browser, CSS, Ink, and renderer-specific imports
Tests cover status, thinking, model, login, tool, yielded-run, compaction, and error descriptors
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add shared status and progress view model
userStories.description: As a user, I want context and quota status to carry the same semantics in Web and CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: Create shared status descriptor with owner, session, model, runtime state, cwd, context usage, provider usage, thinking, fast mode, warnings, and errors
Represent progress/quota bars as renderer-neutral values and labels
Missing usage data is represented as unavailable, not zero
Secret-like values are redacted before rendering
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add shared command catalog and result descriptors
userStories.description: As a CLI and Web user, I want slash command names, descriptions, arguments, and results to stay aligned across renderers.
acceptanceCriteria: Add shared command descriptor types for slash text, action name, description, argument hints, support status, and terminal adaptation metadata
Add shared command result descriptors for menu, status, session-link, text, JSON, unsupported, and error results
Tests cover command filtering and result normalization
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add shared owner room session picker descriptors
userStories.description: As a renderer implementer, I need shared picker descriptors so owner, room, and session selection stay consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Add owner, room, and session picker descriptor types under src/session-ui
Descriptors include labels, descriptions, ids, active/current markers, disabled/archived state, and create-new actions
Tests cover Personal Chat default room and empty-room state
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Wire Web Compact Terminal to shared descriptors without behavior regression
userStories.description: As a Web user, I want existing Compact Terminal behavior preserved while shared models become the source of truth.
acceptanceCriteria: Web Compact Terminal consumes shared descriptors for at least one rich card path without visual/behavior regression
Existing Web tests and chat-ui typecheck pass
No CLI renderer imports Web DOM components
Web regression checks pass
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
